tasks.subject: HTC Task 1: Dockerfile — zig toolchain + cross-built liblzma
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The docker build image gains the `zig` cross-compiler, a PATH-resolvable `llvm-lipo`, and three static `liblzma.a` archives (Windows + macOS x64/arm64).

**Files:** Modify `docker/Dockerfile`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** docker build succeeds; `zig version` + `llvm-lipo --version` run in the image; the three cross-built `liblzma.a` exist; the Android NDK block + `LIBLZMA_ANDROID` are untouched.

**Verify:** `docker build -t gbl-chainload-build:latest -f docker/Dockerfile . && docker run --rm gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'zig version && llvm-lipo --version | head -1 && ls -l /opt/liblzma-windows/lib/liblzma.a /opt/liblzma-macos-x64/lib/liblzma.a /opt/liblzma-macos-arm64/lib/liblzma.a'`

Full code in plan doc HTC Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docker/Dockerfile"], "verifyCommand": "docker build -t gbl-chainload-build:latest -f docker/Dockerfile . && docker run --rm gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'zig version && llvm-lipo --version | head -1 && ls -l /opt/liblzma-windows/lib/liblzma.a /opt/liblzma-macos-x64/lib/liblzma.a /opt/liblzma-macos-arm64/lib/liblzma.a'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docker build succeeds", "zig + llvm-lipo run in the image", "three cross-built liblzma.a archives exist", "Android NDK block untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 2: Windows/macOS make targets — the five dependency-free tools
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `abl-patcher`, `gbl-pack`, `gbl-commit`, `vbmeta-graft`, `mode2-profile` each gain `windows`, `macos-x64`, `macos-arm64` make targets via `zig cc`.

**Files:** Modify `tools/abl-patcher/Makefile`, `tools/gbl-pack/Makefile`, `tools/gbl-commit/Makefile`, `tools/vbmeta-graft/Makefile`, `tools/mode2-profile/Makefile`, `.gitignore`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** each of the five builds windows/macos-x64/macos-arm64; outputs are PE32+ x86-64 / Mach-O; `clean` removes them; `.gitignore` ignores them; host + android still build.

**Verify:** `docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'set -e; for t in abl-patcher gbl-pack gbl-commit vbmeta-graft mode2-profile; do make -C tools/$t clean; make -C tools/$t windows && file tools/$t/$t.exe | grep -q PE32+; make -C tools/$t macos-x64 && file tools/$t/$t-macos-x64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/$t macos-arm64 && file tools/$t/$t-macos-arm64 | grep -q Mach-O; echo ok $t; done'`

Full per-tool Makefile blocks in plan doc HTC Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/abl-patcher/Makefile", "tools/gbl-pack/Makefile", "tools/gbl-commit/Makefile", "tools/vbmeta-graft/Makefile", "tools/mode2-profile/Makefile", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "docker run --rm -v \"$PWD:/work\" -w /work gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'set -e; for t in abl-patcher gbl-pack gbl-commit vbmeta-graft mode2-profile; do make -C tools/$t clean; make -C tools/$t windows && file tools/$t/$t.exe | grep -q PE32+; make -C tools/$t macos-x64 && file tools/$t/$t-macos-x64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/$t macos-arm64 && file tools/$t/$t-macos-arm64 | grep -q Mach-O; echo ok $t; done'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["five tools build windows/macos-x64/macos-arm64 targets", "outputs are PE32+ x86-64 / Mach-O", "clean removes new artifacts; .gitignore ignores them", "host + android targets still build"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 3: fv-unwrap Windows/macOS make targets (liblzma-linked)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `fv-unwrap` gains `windows`/`macos-x64`/`macos-arm64` targets, each linking the matching cross-built static `liblzma.a` from HTC Task 1.

**Files:** Modify `tools/fv-unwrap/Makefile`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** fv-unwrap builds the windows/macos targets (PE32+ / Mach-O for the right arch); links the cross-built liblzma statically; `clean` removes them; host + android still build.

**Verify:** `docker run --rm -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'set -e; make -C tools/fv-unwrap clean; make -C tools/fv-unwrap windows && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap.exe | grep -q PE32+; make -C tools/fv-unwrap macos-x64 && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-macos-x64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/fv-unwrap macos-arm64 && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-macos-arm64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/fv-unwrap android && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-android | grep -q ELF; echo ok fv-unwrap'`

Full code in plan doc HTC Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/fv-unwrap/Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "docker run --rm -v \"$PWD:/work\" -w /work gbl-chainload-build:latest bash -c 'set -e; make -C tools/fv-unwrap clean; make -C tools/fv-unwrap windows && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap.exe | grep -q PE32+; make -C tools/fv-unwrap macos-x64 && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-macos-x64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/fv-unwrap macos-arm64 && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-macos-arm64 | grep -q Mach-O; make -C tools/fv-unwrap android && file tools/fv-unwrap/fv-unwrap-android | grep -q ELF; echo ok fv-unwrap'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fv-unwrap builds windows/macos targets", "outputs PE32+ / Mach-O for the right arch", "links the cross-built liblzma statically", "host + android still build"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 4: build-cross-tools.sh + the 084 cross-build test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A `scripts/build-cross-tools.sh` driver produces `dist/windows/*.exe` and macOS universal binaries in `dist/macos/`; `tests/host/084` verifies all six artifacts are well-formed.

**Files:** Create `scripts/build-cross-tools.sh`, `tests/host/084_cross_build.sh`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** `windows`/`macos`/`all` populate `dist/` with `SHA256SUMS`; invalid arg exits non-zero with usage; `084` passes (PE32+ exes; Mach-O universal with both arch slices); `084` SKIPs cleanly without docker.

**Verify:** `bash tests/host/084_cross_build.sh` → `PASS: 084 cross-build` (or a `SKIP:` line)

Full code in plan doc HTC Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/build-cross-tools.sh", "tests/host/084_cross_build.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/084_cross_build.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build-cross-tools.sh windows/macos/all populate dist/ with SHA256SUMS", "invalid arg exits non-zero with usage", "084 passes: PE32+ exes + Mach-O universal binaries with both arch slices", "084 SKIPs cleanly without docker"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 5: efisp-package.py orchestration wrapper + host test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A cross-platform Python wrapper, `scripts/efisp-package.py`, chains the host-side tools into one ready-to-flash EFISP payload; `tests/host/085` exercises it per mode.

**Files:** Create `scripts/efisp-package.py`, `tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** mode 1 chains `fv-unwrap → abl-patcher → gbl-pack → concat` into a PE with a locatable GBLP1 overlay; mode 0 adds `--no-mode1`; mode 2 requires `--stock-vbmeta`+`--oem`, derives+compiles a profile, passes `--mode2-profile`; bad inputs abort non-zero pre-flight with no partial output; tools located via `--tools-dir`/`dist/<platform>/`/script-dir/PATH; `085` passes or SKIPs cleanly.

**Verify:** `bash tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh` → `PASS: 085 efisp package` (or a `SKIP:` line)

Full code in plan doc HTC Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/efisp-package.py", "tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash tests/host/085_efisp_package.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mode 1 chains the tools into a PE with a locatable GBLP1 overlay", "mode 0 uses --no-mode1; mode 2 derives+compiles a profile and passes --mode2-profile", "bad inputs abort non-zero pre-flight, no partial output", "tools located via --tools-dir/dist/script-dir/PATH", "085 passes or SKIPs cleanly"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 6: consolidated tools/README.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** One `tools/README.md` documents every host-side tool — purpose, CLI usage, build flavors, platform matrix — and `tools/mode2-profile/README.md` is folded in and deleted.

**Files:** Create `tools/README.md`; delete `tools/mode2-profile/README.md`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** README has intro, Building section (host/android/windows-macos), six per-tool sections, an `efisp-package.py` section, a platform matrix; each tool section has the exact synopsis + a worked example; `vbmeta-graft` documents `graft` vs `check`; `mode2-profile/README.md` deleted with no dangling references; no authoring placeholder remains.

**Verify:** `test -f tools/README.md && ! test -e tools/mode2-profile/README.md && grep -q build-cross-tools tools/README.md && echo OK` → `OK`

Full skeleton + exact synopses in plan doc HTC Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tools/README.md", "tools/mode2-profile/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f tools/README.md && ! test -e tools/mode2-profile/README.md && grep -q build-cross-tools tools/README.md && echo OK", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tools/README.md covers intro, build flavors, six per-tool sections, efisp-package.py, platform matrix", "each tool section has exact synopsis + worked example", "vbmeta-graft section explains graft vs check", "mode2-profile/README.md deleted, no dangling references", "no authoring placeholder remains"]}
```

tasks.subject: HTC Task 7: GitHub Actions CI — cross-build + run on real Windows/macOS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A `.github/workflows/host-tools.yml` workflow cross-builds the tools in the docker image and runs each binary on real `windows-latest` and `macos-latest` runners.

**Files:** Create `.github/workflows/host-tools.yml`.

**Acceptance Criteria:** triggers on push/PR touching `tools/**`, `scripts/build-cross-tools.sh`, `docker/**`, the workflow file, + `workflow_dispatch`; the `cross-build` job (ubuntu) builds the image, runs `build-cross-tools.sh all`, uploads `dist/windows`+`dist/macos`; `test-windows` + `test-macos` download the artifacts and run each of the six binaries asserting the usage banner; the YAML is valid.

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/host-tools.yml')); print('YAML OK')"` → `YAML OK`

Full YAML in plan doc HTC Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/host-tools.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/host-tools.yml')); print('YAML OK')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["triggers on tools/scripts/docker/workflow paths + workflow_dispatch", "cross-build job builds image, runs build-cross-tools.sh all, uploads artifacts", "test-windows + test-macos run each binary on the real OS and check the usage banner", "workflow YAML is valid"]}
```
